title: The Karate Mouse
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo trains in karate and surprises everyone by winning the World Championship in San Mouscisco! 🥋

options.en: A friend of Geronimo who loves extreme sports
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩一位热爱极限运动的朋友
一位严厉的空手道师傅
一位给老鼠做按摩的鼠

explain.en: Bruce Hyena is a devoted sportsmouse who loves all athletic activity, especially extreme sports, and he calls Geronimo Cheesehead.
explain.zh: 布鲁斯·鬣狗是一位热衷运动的老鼠，特别喜欢极限运动，他还给杰罗尼摩起了“奶酪脑袋”的外号。

q.en: What is Shorty Tao's job at the newspaper?
q.zh: 肖蒂·陶在报社担任什么职务？

explain.en: By day, Shorty Tao is the managing editor of The Rodent's Gazette, and she is also a karate world champion.
explain.zh: 白天，肖蒂·陶是《鼠民公报》的执行主编，同时她也是空手道世界冠军。

q.en: Where did Bruce and Shorty take Geronimo for the tournament?
q.zh: 布鲁斯和肖蒂把杰罗尼摩带到了哪里参加比赛？

explain.en: They flew Geronimo to San Mouscisco on the western coast of Mouse Island for the karate world championship.
explain.zh: 他们把杰罗尼摩带到了老鼠岛西海岸的圣鼠西斯科，参加空手道世界锦标赛。

explain.en: The book explains that a dojo is a school for learning karate, a word that comes from Japan.
explain.zh: 书中说明，道场是学习空手道的场所，这个词来自日本。

q.en: What color belt did Geronimo earn after training?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩训练后获得了什么颜色的腰带？

explain.en: After a week of training, Geronimo had learned enough to advance to a green belt.
explain.zh: 经过一周训练，杰罗尼摩学到了足够多的内容，升到了绿带。

q.en: What secret move did Geronimo use to win his match?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩用了什么秘密招式赢得了比赛？

explain.en: Geronimo used a jumping-front-reverse-roundhouse kick taught by Sensei Yamamouse and yelled 'HIII YAAA' to win.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩使出了山鼠师傅教的腾空前旋回踢，大喊“嗨呀”，从而获胜。

q.en: Who was Geronimo's opponent in the final match?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在决赛中的对手是谁？

explain.en: On the tatami, Geronimo's opponent was the tough-looking Mousoshi Champrat from Japan.
explain.zh: 在比赛垫上，杰罗尼摩的对手是来自日本、看起来很强壮的鼠士·尚普拉特。

q.en: What did the clinic test check to make sure of?
q.zh: 体检处的检测是为了确认什么？

options.en: That Geronimo did not cheat with drugs
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩没有靠药物作弊

explain.en: Officials took Geronimo to the clinic to test that he had not cheated using illegal substances.
explain.zh: 官员把杰罗尼摩带到体检处，检测他是否用违禁药物作弊。

q.en: Which athlete was disqualified for cheating?
q.zh: 哪位运动员因为作弊被取消了资格？

explain.en: Butch Strongmouse's test came back positive because his trainer gave him illegal strength drugs, so he was disqualified.
explain.zh: 布奇·壮鼠的检测呈阳性，因为他的教练给了他违禁的增力药物，所以他被取消了资格。

q.en: Where did Shorty invite Geronimo to travel next?
q.zh: 肖蒂邀请杰罗尼摩接下来去哪里旅行？

explain.en: After the tournament, Shorty invited Geronimo to Okinawa, Japan, the island where karate was born.
explain.zh: 比赛结束后，肖蒂邀请杰罗尼摩去日本冲绳，那是空手道的发源地。
